question: Which data source domains are associated with datasets that list at least two different data sources?
What natural languages are reported for datasets whose data format is marked as strict?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?naturalLanguage WHERE {
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 ;
    orkgp:P181011 ?dataset .
  ?dataset orkgp:P181022 ?dtype .
  ?dtype orkgp:P181024 ?rigor .
  ?rigor rdfs:label ?rigorLabel .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?rigorLabel)), "strict"))
  ?dtype orkgp:P181025 ?lang .
  OPTIONAL { ?lang rdfs:label ?langLabel . }
  BIND(COALESCE(?langLabel, STR(?lang)) AS ?naturalLanguage)
}

question: What license types are used for implemented approaches released through a public repository?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?licenseTypeText WHERE {
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 ;
    orkgp:P181046 ?approach .
  ?approach orkgp:release ?release ;
           orkgp:P181027 ?licenseType .
  ?release orkgp:P181029 ?locationType .
  ?locationType rdfs:label ?locationTypeLabel .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?locationTypeLabel)), "repository") || CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?locationTypeLabel)), "github"))
  OPTIONAL { ?licenseType rdfs:label ?licenseTypeLabel . }
  BIND(COALESCE(?licenseTypeLabel, STR(?licenseType)) AS ?licenseTypeText)
}

question: Which intercoder reliability metrics are reported when annotator conflicts are resolved by discussion or consensus?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?reliabilityMetric WHERE {
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 ;
    orkgp:P181031 ?annotationProcess .
  ?annotationProcess orkgp:P181041 ?agreement .
  ?agreement orkgp:P181044 ?resolution .
  ?resolution rdfs:label ?resolutionLabel .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?resolutionLabel)), "discussion") || CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?resolutionLabel)), "consensus"))
  ?agreement orkgp:P181042 ?metric .
  OPTIONAL { ?metric rdfs:label ?metricLabel . }
  BIND(COALESCE(?metricLabel, STR(?metric)) AS ?reliabilityMetric)
}

question: How many contributions report both an evaluation metric and a validation procedure?
How many contributions mention an annotation scheme whose guidelines are publicly available?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?contribution) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 ;
    orkgp:P181031 ?annotationProcess .
  ?annotationProcess orkgp:P181036 ?scheme .
  ?scheme orkgp:P181038 ?guidelineAvailability .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(COALESCE(?guidelineAvailability, STR(?guidelineAvailability)))), "public"))
}

question: In which years were the papers published that describe annotation processes with more than two annotators?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>

PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?year WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution ;
         orkgp:P29 ?year .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 ;
    orkgp:P181031 ?annotationProcess .
  ?annotationProcess orkgp:P181032 ?annotator .
  ?annotator orkgp:P59120 ?numberOfAnnotators .
  FILTER(xsd:integer(?numberOfAnnotators) > 2)
}

FILTER(LCASE(STR(?venue_name)) = LCASE("IEEE International Requirements Engineering Conference")) . ?contribution orkgp:P39099 ?threats . } ORDER BY ?year

question: How many papers report both qualitative data and inferential statistics?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?paper) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?paper a orkgc:C27001 .
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution orkgp:P56008 ?dc .
  ?dc orkgp:DATA ?data .
  ?data orkgp:P7055 ?dtype .
  ?dtype rdfs:label ?dtypeLabel .
  FILTER(LCASE(STR(?dtypeLabel)) = LCASE('qualitative'))
  ?contribution orkgp:P15124 ?da .
  ?da orkgp:P56043 ?inf .
}

question: Which evaluation metrics are used for contributions that employ cross-validation?
What license types are reported for implemented approaches released on GitHub?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT (COALESCE(?licenseTypeLabel, STR(?licenseType)) AS ?licenseTypeValue) WHERE {
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 ;
    orkgp:P181046 ?approach .
  ?approach orkgp:release ?release .
  ?release orkgp:P1003 ?url .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?url)), 'github'))
  ?approach orkgp:P181027 ?licenseType .
  OPTIONAL { ?licenseType rdfs:label ?licenseTypeLabel . }
}

question: How many data sources are reported for datasets whose source domain includes information systems?

PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>

PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?numSources WHERE {
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 ;
    orkgp:P181011 ?dataset .
  ?dataset orkgp:P181017 ?source .
  ?source orkgp:P181020 ?domain .
  ?domain rdfs:label ?domainLabel .
  FILTER(LCASE(STR(?domainLabel)) = LCASE('information systems'))
  ?source orkgp:P181019 ?numSources .
}

question: How many annotators are reported for annotation processes that resolve conflicts by discussion?

question: In which year were the data produced for datasets with more than one annotator?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?productionTime WHERE {
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 ;
    orkgp:P181011 ?dataset ;
    orkgp:P181031 ?annotationProcess .
  ?annotationProcess orkgp:P181032 ?annotator .
  ?annotator orkgp:P59120 ?numAnnotators .
  FILTER(?numAnnotators > 1)
  ?dataset orkgp:P181016 ?productionTime .
}

question: How many contributions report English as the natural language and a token-level data format?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?contribution) AS ?numContributions) WHERE {
  ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 ;
    orkgp:P181011 ?dataset .
  ?dataset orkgp:P181022 ?dataType .
  ?dataType orkgp:P181025 ?naturalLanguage ;
    orkgp:P181023 ?dataFormat .
  ?naturalLanguage rdfs:label ?naturalLanguageLabel .
  FILTER(LCASE(STR(?naturalLanguageLabel)) = LCASE('english'))
  ?dataFormat rdfs:label ?dataFormatLabel .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?dataFormatLabel)), 'token-level'))
}

question: Which 10 papers report a data collection method whose name contains interview?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?paper ?paperLabel WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 .
  ?contribution orkgp:P56008 ?dc .
  ?dc orkgp:P1005 ?method .
  ?method orkgp:P145012 ?methodName .
  BIND(LCASE(STR(?methodName)) AS ?methodNameLC)
  FILTER(REGEX(?methodNameLC, 'interview'))
  ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel .
}
ORDER BY ?paperLabel
LIMIT 10

question: What is the average publication year of papers that report a quantitative data type?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT (AVG(xsd:decimal(?year)) AS ?avgYear) WHERE {
  SELECT DISTINCT ?paper ?year WHERE {
    ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
    ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 .
    ?paper orkgp:P29 ?year .
    ?contribution orkgp:P56008 ?dc .
    ?dc orkgp:DATA ?data .
    ?data orkgp:P7055 ?dataType .
    ?dataType rdfs:label ?dataTypeLabel .
    FILTER(LCASE(STR(?dataTypeLabel)) = LCASE('quantitative'))
  }
}

PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT (MIN(xsd:integer(?year)) AS ?earliestYear) WHERE {
  SELECT DISTINCT ?paper ?year WHERE {
    ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
    ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 .
    ?paper orkgp:P29 ?year .
    ?contribution orkgp:P56008 ?dc .
    ?dc orkgp:P1005 ?method .
    ?method orkgp:P145012 ?methodName .
    FILTER(REGEX(LCASE(STR(?methodName)), 'survey'))
  }
}

question: In what year was the earliest paper published among those that report a qualitative data type?

PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>

SELECT (MIN(xsd:integer(?year)) AS ?earliestYear) WHERE {
  SELECT DISTINCT ?paper ?year WHERE {
    ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
    ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 .
    ?paper orkgp:P29 ?year .
    ?contribution orkgp:P56008 ?dc .
    ?dc orkgp:DATA ?data .
    ?data orkgp:P7055 ?dataType .
    ?dataType rdfs:label ?dataTypeLabel .
    FILTER(LCASE(STR(?dataTypeLabel)) = LCASE('qualitative'))
  }
}

question: In what year was the earliest paper published among those that report a null hypothesis and a statistical technique?

PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>

PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT (MIN(xsd:integer(?year)) AS ?earliestYear) WHERE {
  SELECT DISTINCT ?paper ?year WHERE {
    ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
    ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 .
    ?paper orkgp:P29 ?year .
    ?contribution orkgp:P15124 ?da .
    ?da orkgp:P56043 ?inf .
    ?inf orkgp:P30001 ?hyp .
    ?hyp orkgp:P41703 ?htype .
    ?htype rdfs:label ?htypeLabel .
    FILTER(REGEX(LCASE(STR(?htypeLabel)), 'null hypothesis'))
    ?inf orkgp:P35133 ?tech .
  }
}
